label: SUBSTRATE_BENCH
note: HSWM vs strong memory-substrate baselines (retrieval-structure category, NOT reasoner). direct = inference-time LLM reasoner shown as ceiling only.

budget_asymmetry.ppr: pure structure (idf co-occurrence graph + PPR), 0 embeddings, 0 LLM
budget_asymmetry.hswm: bge-m3 embeddings + 100 OFFLINE LLM judgment calls to train additive-j field
budget_asymmetry.direct_reference_ceiling: 100 LLM rerank calls AT INFERENCE — reasoner, not substrate
budget_asymmetry.caveat: ONLY HSWM (and direct) spend LLM budget. A 0-LLM pure-structure arm (ppr/bm25) matching HSWM means structure carries it, not the 100 LLM judgments.

downstream_f1.note: cosine/hswm/direct F1 reused from stored runs; bm25/ppr/rrf F1 computed here (cache-shared with stored reader on identical top-3 sets).

hswm_judgment_note: 300 = parity-counter increments across 3 field rebuilds (100/run); these were CACHE HITS not new compute — retrieval-only phase completed fully offline in 6.3s and rebuild matched stored aggregates exactly, so 0 new judgment network calls.
